acceptanceCriteria: New test file lives in tests/integration/test_migrations.py
Test runs in the CI test job (Postgres service is already provisioned via DATABASE_URL)
Test fails if a migration drops data, breaks foreign keys, or removes required constraints
Uses the same Postgres connection pattern as other integration tests (env DATABASE_URL)
One behavior per test where practical (e.g. separate tests for downgrade data survival vs constraint integrity)

resolvedDecisions.decision: Skip migration integration tests when DATABASE_URL is unreachable; CI test job Postgres service is authoritative

promptCacheBlock:
# Issue #365 — Alembic migration integration tests

## In scope
- tests/integration/test_migrations.py with seeded row survival + constraint checks
- DATABASE_URL via sync_database_url (same as Alembic env.py)
- Skip when Postgres unreachable locally

## Out of scope
- New migrations, web/, ios/, src/modules/ml/
